title: Section 1
content: This Act may be called the Court-fees Act, 1870. Extent of Act. -- It extends to the whole of India except 1[the territories which, immediately before the 1st November, 1956, were comprised in Part B States]; Commencement of Act. -- And it shall come into force on the first day of April, 1870.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the Adaptation of Laws (No. 2) Order, 1956, for Part B States.
